preferred_name: total error (diff. press., 69 bar static press., -10°C to 60°C, zero & span)

preferred_name_ml.en: total error (diff. press., 69 bar static press., -10°C to 60°C, zero & span)
preferred_name_ml.fr: err. tot. (press diff, press stat. 69 bar, -10°C-60°C, zéro & étendue de mesure)
preferred_name_ml.de: Gesamtabweichung (Diff.-Druck, 69 bar stat. Druck, -10°C-60°C, Nullpkt & Spanne)

definition: for differential pressure measuring devices, total error for one year, calculated by the sum of the total performance (differential pressure, 69 bar, -10 °C to 60 °C, zero and span) and the long term drift per annum, expressed as percentage of span

definition_ml.en: for differential pressure measuring devices, total error for one year, calculated by the sum of the total performance (differential pressure, 69 bar, -10 °C to 60 °C, zero and span) and the long term drift per annum, expressed as percentage of span
definition_ml.fr: pour des appareils de mesure de pression différentielle, erreur totale pour un an, calculée par la somme des performances totales (pression différentielle, 69 bars, -10 °C à 60 °C, zéro et intervalle de mesure) et de la dérive à long terme par année, exprimée en pourcentage d'intervalle de mesure
definition_ml.de: Gesamtfehler eines Jahres bei Differenzdruckmessgeräten, berechnet durch die Summe der Grundgenauigkeit (Differenzdruck, 69 bar, -10 °C bis 60 °C, Null und Spanne) und der langfristigen Abweichung pro Jahr, in relativen Einheiten der Spanne
